component.name: UrlInputDialog
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("dialogBg") m.inputBox = m.top.findNode("urlInput") m.historyList = m.top.findNode("historyList") m.statusLabel = m.top.findNode("dialogStatus") m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("dialogTitle") m.historyData = [] m.inputBox.observeField("text", "onTextChange") m.historyList.observeField("itemSelected", "onHistorySelected") m.inputBox.setFocus(true) end sub
sub onVisibleChange(event as Object) if event.getData() = true m.inputBox.text = "" m.inputBox.setFocus(true) btvRefreshHistory("") end if end sub
sub onUrlHistoryChange(event as Object) raw = event.getData() if raw = "" then return parsed = ParseJson(raw) if type(parsed) = "roArray" m.historyData = parsed btvRefreshHistory("") end if end sub
sub onTextChange(event as Object) typed = event.getData() btvRefreshHistory(typed) end sub
sub btvRefreshHistory(filter as String) root = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") i = 0 count = 0 while i < m.historyData.count() url = m.historyData[i] i = i + 1 if type(url) = "roString" show = false if filter = "" show = true else if instr(1, lcase(url), lcase(filter)) > 0 show = true end if if show = true child = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") child.title = url root.appendChild(child) count = count + 1 end if end if if count >= 8 then exit while end while m.historyList.content = root if count > 0 m.statusLabel.text = mid(stri(count), 2) + " matches - OK to use, or keep typing" else m.statusLabel.text = "No history matches - type full URL then OK" end if end sub
sub onHistorySelected(event as Object) idx = event.getData() node = m.historyList.content if type(node) = "roInvalid" then return child = node.getChild(idx) if type(child) = "roInvalid" then return m.top.selectedUrl = child.title end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press = false then return false if key = "back" m.top.cancelled = true return true else if key = "OK" or key = "play" typed = m.inputBox.text if typed <> "" m.top.selectedUrl = typed return true end if else if key = "down" m.historyList.setFocus(true) return true else if key = "up" m.inputBox.setFocus(true) return true end if return false end function

Label.text: Type a URL or select from history
